chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1513 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 06.09.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- None present for the petitioners. Even on the last date no one was in attendance on behalf of the petitioners. This matter is pending since 2012 that concerns with the supply of irrigation water. The petitioners at best could seek redressal of their grievance from the Irrigation Department in terms of their Khata. However, since petitioners and their counsel are not appearing in this matter for the last two dates matter is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
